role: Iran Project Director, International Crisis Group
bio: Ali Vaez is the Iran project director at the [International Crisis Group](/orgs/international-crisis-group) and a protégé of [Robert Malley](/people/robert-malley). He was identified as a member of the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023). Leaked emails showed he shared a draft nuclear policy article with [IPIS](/orgs/ipis) head [Mostafa Zahrani](/people/mostafa-zahrani) before publication; the article was subsequently published in the National Interest in June 2014 under a modified title. He attended the inaugural IEI meeting at Vienna's Palais Coburg in May 2014 and advised Malley's Iran negotiating team.
editorial_notes: ICG Iran director. Malley protégé. IEI member.
